## Text Formatting

This is **bold text** and this is *italic text*. You can also use ~~strikethrough~~ and combine **_bold italic_** together.

## Nested Lists

- First item
  - Nested item A
  - Nested item B
    - Deeply nested
- Second item
  1. Ordered sub-item
  2. Another ordered sub-item
